plan.goal: incremental-semantic-db-runtime-engine-rewrite: transform PRISM into a true incremental semantic database with a WorkspaceRuntimeEngine actor, heavy parallel preparation and settle pipelines, coalesced edit batches, a minimal serialized commit, and snapshots limited to checkpoint recovery and query acceleration.
